headline: Nike Restructuring And Severance Charge Test Turnaround Under New CEO
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) announced a major restructuring initiative with about US$300 million in pre tax charges tied to employee severance. The plan comes alongside a new leadership phase under CEO Elliott Hill, with an emphasis on streamlining operations and focused performance athleticwear. The restructuring includes significant job cuts and cost realignment that are expected to create short term disruption while shifting the company toward a leaner model. Nike sits at the center of global...
